OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Jeffery McCormick.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marketa Drbohilavova is present.
Attorney Steven Chan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May-29-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
